$description: Component tokens for Mobile Tag Count component - a small badge/pill-shaped component used to display numeric counts or quantities. Features rounded corners, light background, and dark text. Supports 4 size variants (xs, sm, md, lg) for different mobile interface contexts. Figma Reference: Node ID 393-814

$component.name: Tag Count
$component.description: A mobile badge component used to display numeric counts, quantities, or indicators. Typically appears as a small pill-shaped element with rounded corners, containing centered numeric text. Used in navigation items, buttons, tabs, and other UI elements to show counts or notifications.
$component.structure: Horizontally elongated rounded rectangle container with centered numeric text. Background color provides subtle visual distinction, text color ensures readability.

sizes.xs: Extra small size for compact mobile interfaces - typically 12px height
sizes.sm: Small size for standard mobile interfaces - typically 16px height
sizes.md: Medium size for prominent mobile displays - typically 18px height
sizes.lg: Large size for emphasized mobile displays - typically 18px height

variants.default: Standard tag count with neutral gray background and dark gray text

usage.contexts: Mobile navigation badges, tab indicators, button counts, notification badges, filter counts, list item quantities, mobile menu indicators
usage.features: Numeric count display, compact sizing, rounded pill shape, subtle background, clear text contrast

container.$comment: Container properties for mobile tag count component - background, border radius, padding, and height

default.description: Mobile tag count default background color - neutral/gray-100 - #f2f4f7 (light gray background)

border.$comment: Border radius for mobile tag count component - creates rounded pill shape

xs.description: Mobile tag count border radius for xs size - 2px (slightly rounded corners)

sm.description: Mobile tag count border radius for sm size - 2px (slightly rounded corners)

md.description: Mobile tag count border radius for md size - 2px (slightly rounded corners)

lg.description: Mobile tag count border radius for lg size - 4px (more rounded corners for larger size)

padding.$comment: Internal padding for mobile tag count component - horizontal (x) and vertical (y) spacing around text

xs.description: Mobile tag count horizontal padding for xs size - 2px (minimal padding for compact size)

sm.description: Mobile tag count horizontal padding for sm size - 4px (standard padding)

md.description: Mobile tag count horizontal padding for md size - 5px (slightly more padding for medium size)

lg.description: Mobile tag count horizontal padding for lg size - 6px (more padding for larger size)

xs.description: Mobile tag count vertical padding for xs size - 0px (no vertical padding, height determined by font size)

sm.description: Mobile tag count vertical padding for sm size - 0px (no vertical padding, height determined by font size)

md.description: Mobile tag count vertical padding for md size - 0px (no vertical padding, height determined by font size)

lg.description: Mobile tag count vertical padding for lg size - 0px (no vertical padding, height determined by font size)

size.$comment: Height dimensions for mobile tag count component - determines overall component height for each size variant

xs.description: Mobile tag count height for xs size - 12px (compact height for small badges)

sm.description: Mobile tag count height for sm size - 16px (standard height for mobile badges)

md.description: Mobile tag count height for md size - 18px (medium height for prominent badges)

lg.description: Mobile tag count height for lg size - 18px (larger height for emphasized badges)

content.$comment: Content properties for mobile tag count component - text color and typography

default.description: Mobile tag count default text color - neutral/gray-700 - #344054 (dark gray text for good contrast on light background)

typography.$comment: Typography tokens for mobile tag count text content across all sizes

xs.description: Mobile tag count text typography for xs size - Medium 10px/15px (compact font for small badges)

sm.description: Mobile tag count text typography for sm size - Medium 11px/16px (standard font for mobile badges)

md.description: Mobile tag count text typography for md size - Medium 12px/17px (medium font for prominent badges)

lg.description: Mobile tag count text typography for lg size - Medium 13px/18px (larger font for emphasized badges)
